tier: Tier 7.4h - Policy/Action Attribution Closeout / Mechanism Return Decision
claim: Tier 7.4h closes the held-out policy/action chain by preserving only the narrow C-MAPSS action-cost claim, blocking broad public usefulness, blocking incremental v2.4-over-v2.2 claims, blocking freeze/hardware transfer, and routing the project back to the general mechanism/benchmark roadmap.
caveat: Decision/attribution evidence only; not a new scoring run, not a mechanism promotion, not broad public usefulness, not a new baseline freeze, not hardware/native transfer, and not AGI/ASI evidence.
